recommendations.title: Patriot Games
recommendations.overview: When CIA Analyst Jack Ryan interferes with an IRA assassination, a renegade faction targets Jack and his family as revenge.

recommendations.title: Rabbit-Proof Fence
recommendations.overview: In 1931, three Aboriginal girls escape after being plucked from their homes to be trained as domestic staff, and set off on a trek across the Outback.

recommendations.title: Sliver
recommendations.overview: A woman moves into a Manhattan apartment, where she learns that the previous tenant's life ended under mysterious circumstances.

recommendations.title: The Desperate Hour
recommendations.overview: A woman desperately races to save her child after police place her hometown on lockdown due to an active shooter incident.

recommendations.title: Blind Fury
recommendations.overview: A blind Vietnam vet, trained as a swordfighter, comes to America and helps to rescue the son of a fellow soldier.

recommendations.title: The Giver
recommendations.overview: In a seemingly perfect community, without war, pain, suffering, differences or choice, a young boy is chosen to learn from an elderly man about the true pain and pleasure of the "real" world.

recommendations.title: Fast Charlie
recommendations.overview: When his aging mob boss is whacked, Charlie Swift, a loyal friend and hired gun, will stop at nothing to destroy the upcoming crew that took him out.

recommendations.title: Dead Calm
recommendations.overview: An Australian couple takes a sailing trip in the Pacific to get over the recent loss of their son. While on the open sea, they come across a sinking ship with one survivor who is not at all what he seems.

recommendations.title: The Quiet American
recommendations.overview: Cynical British journalist Fowler falls in love with a young Vietnamese woman but is dismayed when a naïve U.S. official also begins vying for her attention. In retaliation, Fowler informs the communists that the American is selling arms to their ene

recommendations.title: The Saint
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Action, Romance, Science Fiction, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Simon Templar (The Saint), is a thief for hire, whose latest job to steal the secret process for cold fusion puts him at odds with a traitor bent on toppling the Russian government, as well as the woman who holds its secret.
